programme.desc: Po and Blade's personalities clash as they track Klaus and Veruca and fight off some of Po's old foes. Blade gets to see Po's kung fu mastery, but doesn't agree to team up with him until she realizes that he accidentally holds the key to finding Klaus and Veruca: he has a piece of the WuGao Gauntlet. Meanwhile, Klaus and Veruca continue on their path of destruction while looking for the mysterious "Lotus".

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Po's moral lines are blurred when he and Blade have to break an untrustworthy hedgehog monk (Zhen) out of jail to get more information on what Klaus and Veruca stole from the Lotus. They learn from Zhen that there are in fact three more weapons, and Po recognizes one of them from a comic book.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: The evil General Morando launches a coup on the alien planet Akiridion-5. In the ensuing battle, the planet's King and Queen are severely injured, and their surviving son Krel and daughter Aja escape the planet with military commander, Varvatos Vex. They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: In an effort to blend in with their surroundings, Krel engineers a device to get into the "mind-set" of humans and ends up discovering far more than he expected. Meanwhile, General Morando's bounty hunters close in on the Royals.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hare didn't hop. He was one of the speediest animals in Tinga Tinga but none of the other animals wanted to race with him because Hare always won and it was becoming boring. Then one day, slow but clever Tortoise decides to challenge Hare.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: You see there was time when Mosquito didn't buzz. Mosquito was as quiet as quiet can be… and did she like to tell tales. One day Mosquito tells the Monkeys that the sun looks very low in the sky. ‘Maybe it's sad and doesn't want to rise!' worry the Monkeys.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 1
programme.desc: Ted Glenn's Cornish cousin Ned is sending him a steam engine as an alternative means to power his workshop. Pat and Jess set off to Cornwall to collect this very large special delivery in the SDS Plane whilst Ted sets about giving away all of his old inventions to the people of Greendale in order to clear out enough space for the engine. Pat and Jess meet the eccentric Ned Glenn at his workshop and wrestle with the crate containing the heavy engine to get it aboard the plane.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Pat has to deliver some pumpkins to Greendale School for the annual Halloween Pumpkin Party. But when he picks them up from Ted's workshop, Jess starts playing with a giant pumpkin and it rolls into the river and floats away. Pat follows it along the river and tries to fish it out with Alf's rod but the pumpkin is too heavy and the line breaks. As the party gets under way in Greendale, the giant pumpkin floats out to sea and Pat and Jess board the SDS Orca and head out into Pencaster Bay.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Turbo is excited to race on a freeway that is closed for construction, but he needs to complete a series of favors for the crew before he can go. // Burn breaks up with Chet after he forgets her birthday. To make Burn jealous, Turbo dresses up as a girl and pretends to be Chet's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: A fortune-telling moth forecasts doom for Whiplash and though Whip is skeptical, the crew tries to keep him safe so the it doesn't come true. // Skidmark learns the crew is tired of his crazy behavior so he invents a helmet that changes his personality in unpredictable ways.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Everyone in Brickabuild keeps falling asleep and no one can get any building work finished. It's all because the lights keep coming on all night! Noddy decides to investigate who is turning the lights on. Bravely overcoming his own fear of the dark, he follows the clues to discover that the lights are being secretly turned on by a scared Carlton, who doesn't like the dark.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Someone is giving presents to everyone in Toyland and all the toys want to say thank you but no one knows the identity of the secret gift giver! It's up to Noddy to investigate and find out who is it that's leaving presents for all the friends. By following clues and using his investigation skills, Noddy follows the trail to Animal Acres and discovers that Pat Pat and the Pockets are the secret gift-givers.

programme.desc: Smartysaurus is delighted because a little clockwork duck has appeared at the DinoLab. Noddy uses all his skills of thinking, looking, listening and asking questions to find the home for the little duck.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Something very strange is happening in Toyland. Lots of things seem to be jumping in a particular direction for no reason - Revs, Noddy's bell, Big Ear's spoons and kettle. What is going on? Noddy decides to investigate and help his best friend Revs who is very upset.

programme.desc: A quiet Mississippi summer night is shattered by a 911 call reporting a brutal double murder-but as investigators dig deeper, the grieving husband who found the bodies becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: The Score
programme.desc: Hosted by Tom Chitty, "The Score" is CNBC’s smart, fast-moving guide to the forces transforming global sport. Going beyond the drama of the game, the series unpacks the money, power and strategy driving decisions behind the scenes - from boardrooms to locker rooms.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: "American Greed" goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America’s top CEOs, CNBC’s Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 3

programme.title: Razor

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Neighbor's Nurturing Session "After the Parent-Child Conflict" (R)
programme.desc: The program is for parents raising children from elementary to junior high school ages. Parenting problems are difficult to talk to Mom/Dad friends, but they can be serious problems for those involved. Sharing sympathetic voices and ideas gathered from parenting families across the country, we work together to find solutions.

programme.title: What the Villains Have to Say
programme.desc: Cockroaches, Carbon dioxide, Unwanted hair... Villains are anathema to the public as being "dirty, noxious, and ugly." But even villains have a point they want you to hear! In this program, we look at their amazing abilities revealed by the latest research, as well as the real villains, who are actually a little bit fascinating!

programme.title: SCIENCE ZERO

programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 13 (R)
programme.desc: Under Nobunaga’s orders, Koichiro is told to marry Chika (Yoshioka Riho), the daughter of Morinari. Tokichiro celebrates the match, but troubling rumors surround Chika, and she secretly carries deep resentment toward the Oda clan. Meanwhile, Nobunaga decides to wage war against the Asakura and tells Nagamasa he need only guard the rear, since his son is being held as a hostage in Asakura territory.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE (R)
programme.desc: Let’s look into the world of Ukiyoe to learn how people lived in Edo period!

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 6
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: asaichi

programme.title: Project X: The Challengers-New Beginnings The High-Speed Train that Revived the UK (R)
programme.desc: Project X returns for the first time in 18 years. The former series featured people involved in project related to the Japanese industry and contemporary history. The new series focuses on people in the "Lost Era" following the collapse of the bubble economy. In every era, there are always those take on challenges. Even without receiving praise or being in the spotlight, some dedicate themselves to their work. The documentary delivers passion and courage right to you.

programme.title: Natural Grandeur of the East (R)

programme.desc: A young reporter named Yoneko (Furukawa Kotone) visits Rosanjin (Fuji Tatsuya) in his later years, a towering figure in Japanese culinary and artistic aesthetics. Though bewildered by his imperious and self-centered behavior, she continues to call on him to take dictation for his memoir. As she witnesses his interactions with distinguished figures-including Yoshida Shigeru, Noguchi Isamu, and John D.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 70
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 7
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 71
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Night Drama Serial "Radio Star" Ep. 5 (R)
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there’s no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there’s no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: What the Villains Have to Say (R)
programme.desc: Cockroaches, Carbon dioxide, Unwanted hair... Villains are anathema to the public as being "dirty, noxious, and ugly." But even villains have a point they want you to hear! In this program, we look at their amazing abilities revealed by the latest research, as well as the real villains, who are actually a little bit fascinating!

programme.title: The Return of Superman - EP 614
programme.desc: Witness the parenting challenges of "Superman", the first hero that children encounter when they are born.

programme.title: Recipe for Love - EP 16
programme.desc: In the rapidly developing town of Onjeong, two rival medical families - one modern and one traditional - wage a neighbourhood feud fuelled by a long-standing grudge. This drama follows their chaotic journey as they unravel decades of misunderstanding to find healing and love.

programme.desc: Hosts Liu Chenzhi and Zheng Yanfeng embark on a luxurious journey, visiting guests in the United States. They explore little-known stories of former NBA players, entrepreneurs, designers, wealthy women, artists and collectors, understanding their definitions of success.

programme.title: Big Big Home
programme.desc: Host Tan Kaiying travels throughout Taiwan, delving into prime urban locations and promising new town developments to explore impressive luxury villas and unique homes. Several "dreamers" also share their local property buying stories and lifestyle guides.

programme.title: Profession Impossible
programme.desc: A team of aspiring stunt performers, trained by action experts Chin Ka-lok and Lam Tze-on, endure gruelling special forces-style drills and high-risk feats like explosions and drifting to conquer a "Mission Impossible" challenge without quitting!

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: Romance of A Twin Flower - EP 11
programme.desc: Ji Man loses her memory after a fall and awakens as the hated wife of Minister Ning Yuxuan, but turns her fate around through wit, helping him win imperial favour. Together they defeat powerful enemies and overcome political plots, finally finding love amid hardship.

programme.title: News At 18:30 & Global View & What's On Today
programme.desc: Bringing you the news from Hong Kong, the mainland and around the world every evening at 6:30pm.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2780
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Themis - EP 7
programme.desc: High Court judge Yan Huizhi investigates a case involving a 14-year-old boy linked to a child's death. Discovering that he had repeatedly offended without punishment due to his age, she demotes herself to the juvenile court to help reform troubled youths.

programme.title: The Imperial Coroner (II) - EP 24
programme.desc: Newlywed forensic duo Chu Chu and Prince Xiao Jinyu lead the Three Judicial Offices against Nanzhao diplomats' schemes, unravelling haunted palace mysteries and border conspiracies during the Empero's birthday festivities.

programme.title: Journey To The Wealthy West
programme.desc: Hosts Liu Chenzhi and Zheng Yanfeng embark on a luxurious journey, visiting guests in the United States. They explore little-known stories of former NBA players, entrepreneurs, designers, wealthy women, artists and collectors, understanding their definitions of success.

programme.title: EXTRA
programme.desc: Keep up with the news on the entertainment circle in Hong Kong and all over the world, with reports on the latest drama series, movies, concert highlights, award ceremonies and more.

programme.title: News Roundup
programme.desc: Reporting major news from Hong Kong, across the Taiwan Strait, and around the world, keeping you informed about important events as well as updates in the world of sports.

programme.title: Global View
programme.desc: Curated by seasoned journalists, Global View guides you to look at the world with a global perspective - broadening your horizons, expanding your understanding of the news, and enriching your knowledge.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 8
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 23
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 24
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: Gone With The Rain - EP 23
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Dear Enemy - EP 14
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: Dear Enemy - EP 15
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: IDOL I - EP 7
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A tale unfolds around star attorney Maeng Se Na (Choi Soo Young), once a devoted longtime fan herself, who steps up to defend her idol Do Ra Ik (Kim Jae Young) after he is falsely accused of murder, setting off a chain of events that follows.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 8
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: Woori The Virgin - EP 12
programme.desc: Oh Woori (Im Soo Hyang) vowed to remain a virgin until she marries, and has shied away from romantic relationships in a bid to remain chaste. A terrible mixup takes place during her routine checkup and she is accidentally artificially inseminated!

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 26
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Legendary Hong Kong police officer Ho Ho Fai (Jordan Chan), known for his role as one of the Three Tigers, faces a dramatic fall from grace after a failed mission. programme.title: The Best Thing - EP 28
programme.desc: The gentle doctor He Suye and the severely insomniac hotel manager Shen Xifan, who repeatedly cross paths during daily life, gradually develop feelings for each other. In the end, they heal one another and embrace a love story filled with the fragrance of herbal medicine.

programme.title: The Silver Chamber Of Sorrows - EP 15
programme.desc: "Sheung’s Silver Chamber", the largest jewel company in Foshan, Guangdong Province China, is facing serious financial difficulties. In order to obtain a loan from SHUM’s family, SHEUNG HANG (Chun Pui), owner of the Chamber, together with his primary wife, CHOI SIU-DIP (Sit Ka Yin), plot to arrange marriage between SHEUNG WAN (Ng Wai Kwok), HANG’s younger brother, and SHUM WING-TUNG (Young Yuen Yee), daughter of SHUM’s family.

programme.title: Hong Kong Love Stories - EP 10
programme.desc: Nice guy designer Chan Tsz-long (Joey Law) and his idealist girlfriend Yau Hoi-kei (Katy Kung) are a typical Hong Kong couple reluctantly living an unsettled life due to land issues. Tsz-long’s two younger sisters Chan Tsz-yan (Venus Wong) and Chan Tsz-ting (Kayan Yau) are polar opposites. Photographer Tsz-yan keeps indulging in artist Ki Ka-hei’s (Brian Tse) decadent paradise. Well-behaved and diligent college goddess Tsz-ting adopts a realistic approach when she finds her first love.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 16
programme.desc: Financial elite, CHEUK YUK (Bosco Wong), never hesitates to use any dirty tricks to gain a profit, so he has been under close surveillance by the Commercial Crime Bureau (CCB). Being obsessed with money and power, CHEUK YUK constantly neglects his family members and friends. Because of him, his wife and mentor pass away respectively, yet he shows no remorse at all. On the contrary, his craving for money and power continuously increases.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 17
programme.desc: Bookshop staff FONG HOK MAN (Chun Pui) always believes that "knowledge is power". He tries hard to encourage his older son FONG SUM MING (Lai Yiu Cheung) and his younger son FONG SUM CHING (Suen Eric) to study more. Unfortunately, MING is not good at studying at all and he quits after secondary school. On the other hand, CHING is a very smart boy and MING works hard overseas to support CHING’s further studies on computer sciences in America.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 9
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.title: When a Man Loves a Woman - EP 1
programme.desc: Man (Kwok Tsun On), Fai (Ng Chun Yu), Wah (Esther Kwan) and Shan (Fennie Yuen) grew up together and were very good friends. Man, Fai and Shan even shared an apartment. Fai was a playboy. He liked fooling around without any commitment. Man, on the other hand, was very loyal to his girlfriend - Wah._x000D__x000D_Man and Fai treated Shan as their brothers since she acted like a tom-boy. However, Shan was in love with Fai.

programme.title: Can't Buy Me Love - EP 11
programme.desc: Reluctant to marry into the Tibetan royal family, the willful Princess CHIU YEUNG (Charmaine Sheh) has to find herself a husband as soon as possible. Owner of a gold store TING LOI-HEI (Kwan Kuk Ying) recommends her second and third sons, KAM DOR-LUK (Moses Chan) and KAM DOR-SHAU (Wong Ho Yin) to the Princess, hoping that the royal marriage would bring them out of financial crisis and save their family business somehow.

programme.title: Unchained Medleyr - EP 16
programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung). In the 1990s, Lau-fong was a Cantonese opera diva, but she passed away due to some accident. Lau-fong has forgotten almost everything about her human life.

programme.title: Succession War - EP 2
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 12
programme.desc: Gifted cooking talent Tak (Wong Hei) wants to be a successful chef. He does not give up even when his father Kin (Leung Ka Yan) is against the idea. His uncle Kwai (Lau Kar Fai) is on his side and finally Tak is given a chance to learn in a Chinese restaurant in a hotel. There he meets his dream girl Wing (Kennix Kwok) and wins her heart. Tak’s best friend Lam (Fennie Yuen) is upset when she learns about this.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 13
programme.desc: Gifted cooking talent Tak (Wong Hei) wants to be a successful chef. He does not give up even when his father Kin (Leung Ka Yan) is against the idea. programme.title: Mr Vampire II
programme.desc: Grave-robbing archaeologists unearth a family of preserved vampires and plan to sell them on the black market. However, they accidentally break the paper spells that had kept the vampires immobilized during transport. The vampires escape, but a local herbalist Lin is soon on their trail, determined to destroy them.

programme.title: Mr Vampire
programme.desc: Taoist priest Kou is assigned to re-bury a rich man, in the hope that the new tomb will bring further prosperity. When the corpse turns into a vampire and wreaks havoc in the village, his disciples are also hurt by the vampire and possessed by a female ghost respectively. How can Kou save his disciples and hunt down the vampire at the same time?

programme.title: When Fortune Smiles
programme.desc: A rich man dies, leaving all his fortune to his daughter in his will, but his son and nephew want a piece of the pie. The nephew sends Vincent to steal the will and the son finds Fung, who looks like his sister, to get the will. Vincent plans to marry Fung for the fortune, but as the two fall in love, they decide to unveil the cunning schemes.

programme.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
programme.desc: The movie is adapted from real events. Detective Lin sets up a special unit to arrest the motorbike robber and the crime syndicate behind the thefts in Foshan. In the process, his pregnant wife is hit by a motorbike robber, leading him to uncover their revenge plan...

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: Faithfully Yours
programme.desc: Playboy Hong Kong Barber Happy Chan opens a fashionable new salon, right next to an old-fashioned Shanhainese barber shop. Its owner, Chuk, is furious at this development and starts a quarrel with Chan and his colleagues during the opening ceremony of his new venture Chuk's pretty daughter, Ying, is forced to keep the peace. Chan and his friends all attempt to woo Ying, but end up getting drunk and falling asleep in her bedroom.

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: After provoking the son of a local tyrant, young Wong Fei Hung is sent by his father to train under Drunken Master Beggar So. When his father uncovers the tyrant's plot to sell mines to the Japanese, he becomes a target for assassination. To save his father and stop the sale, Fei Hung must forge his own "Drunken Fist" style to defeat the killers.

programme.title: Zombie Island
programme.desc: Jeff, a big fan of zombies, goes to a deserted and mysterious island with his friends hoping to seek out exciting adventures. What started as an adventure turns out to be a horrifying journey as they get trapped on the island and are attacked by the zombies! Their lives are in danger when they fail to fight back, and the game has only just begun!

programme.title: Challenge of the Gamesters
programme.desc: A gambling master and his partner are hired by the government to investigate another gambler who may be working as a Japanese spy in Shanghai.

programme.title: How to Pick Girls Up !
programme.desc: Xin, a helpless loser in love, calls in to a radio show hosted by DJ Tsang to ask desperately for help. A self-proclaimed love expert, Tsang takes it upon himself to make sure Xin meets girls and leads him on a series of absurd excursions into the wild and dangerous world of modern love.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: After the Sino-Japanese war, Wing Chun grandmaster Ip Man and his family experience hardship in their hometown and eventually moved to Hong Kong for a new life. He wants to open a martial arts school in Hong Kong, but first he must pass and win the challenges put forth by the local martial arts grandmasters.

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud's successor as the city's guard.

programme.title: Sixty Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Sing is a rich man studying abroad, but is so spoiled that he can never concentrate on his studies but spends his time flirting with girls. One day, Sing gets blown up by a mobster when he hooks up with his mistress, Silvia. This arrogant prankster is resurrected instead as an unbeatable cyborg with unique skills, a real job and a new true love.

programme.title: Doubles Cause Troubles
programme.desc: Two squabbling cousins find themselves in more trouble than they can imagine after their tenant ends up dead. The gangsters and the police are both after them, and they have no idea what they have done wrong!

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: Gangster Chen Da Qi rises to the upper echelons of power, but finds himself torn between the love of two women, the murderous plots of the secret service, and the looming threat of war.

programme.title: Women
programme.desc: Bo Yi's husband is having an affair, so Bo Yi divorces him and joins the "Happy Spinsters Club" set up by her friends. However, she soon finds out that she does not enjoy being single and while sorting out her thoughts, her repentant husband begs her forgiveness. She must now decide on what she truly wants.

programme.title: Royal Tramp
programme.desc: Wei Xiao Bao is sent by a revolutionary group to be a spy in the imperial palace and find "The Sutra of 42 Chapters". Xiao Bao soon befriends Emperor Kang Xi but must carry out his mission at the same time, so he is caught between two camps.

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian, in order to seek evidence against his gang. After their release from jail, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, just as Shan successfully cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua's hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: Cop Shop Babes
programme.desc: Island East Police Station headed by Madam Lui is known for its "Cop Shop Babes" as all the officers there are female. Two police officers, Beer and Satay, apply for an internal transfer to this station in order to approach the girls. It is at this time that the police receives a bomb threat - can they resolve the case?

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears...

programme.title: Forbidden City Cop
programme.desc: A wild and hilariously anachronistic tale of an imperial guard of the Forbidden City who has no martial arts abilities. When the emperor is abducted, he saved the day with his unusual hobby: tinkering with futuristic inventions!

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao's enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei's concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: How to Choose a Royal Bride
programme.desc: The Empress Dowager has arranged for a Minister's daughter Qiong Yao, to become Emperor Kangxi's concubine. However, Qiong Yao escapes in pursuit of freedom in marriage and Kangxi is happy to not go through with the union. When Kangxi travels incognito to Jiangnan, he serendipitously encounters Qiong Yao, who disguises herself as a man...

programme.title: Cruel War
programme.desc: To combat the greenhouse effect, scientist Yan Xin attempts to plant newly developed super rubber seeds on a remote island, hoping to transform it into a thriving new land. Yan Xin's ex-husband decides to accompany her on this perilous journey. As conflicts arise, they encounter the local drug cartel, and a fatal battle is about to begin.

programme.title: The Mad Monk
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays an arrogant god in Heaven who is being punished for his pranks and mistakes. He is sent to Earth and reincarnate as Mad Monk to change the destiny of three misguided souls - a prostitute, a beggar and a villain. The Mad Monk needs to complete the task in three days in order to return to Heaven.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Directed by the acclaimed filmmaker Wong Kar Wai, this epic action feature begins in Foshan when Ip Man, the martial arts master from the south, takes up a challenge by ageing northern master Gong Yu Tian. Ip Man wins the fight, but is then defeated by Gong Yu Tian's daughter Gong Er, with whom he forms an emotional bond...

programme.title: Mother VS Mother
programme.desc: Guan De Xing fell in love with Li Xiao Yun when he was young, but was opposed by his mother and had to marry Zhou Shen Yu. Since then, Li holds a grudge against Zhou. Unfortunately, the son of Guan and Zhou falls in love with Li's daughter, and as the two mothers meet, they start brawling again!

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory in an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help other coworkers leave safely and fight to kill the monster!

programme.title: Secret Service of the Imperial Court
programme.desc: Zhao Bu Fan is the sergeant of the government's secret police. Wang is a cruel and ruthless eunuch who takes over the Emperor's ruling power and leads the team of secret agents. After witnessing the atrocities committed by Eunuch Wang, Sergeant Zhao decides to defect but ends up being hunted by his friends, comrades and even his father.

programme.title: Moods Of Love
programme.desc: This Song Dynasty period piece about how far one would go for love (or lust) has two tales. The first involves a devilish magistrate who tries to tempt a Buddhist monk out of his self-professed celibacy by hiring a pretty prostitute. The second is the tragic tale of an exploited young girl who is forced to work in an unscrupulous couple's brothel.

programme.title: Clan Of The White Lotus
programme.desc: The head of White Lotus Clan, Lo, is a highly skilled martial artist who supports the Qing government and helps destroy the rebellion group. Hung from Shaolin who kills Lo's brother, is being hunted and hides in another rebel Hu's house. The clan attacks at night killing Hu and his sister, but Hung manages to get Hu's pregnant wife to safety.

programme.title: Little Hero
programme.desc: An orphan, Little Bastard is taken on and trained as a fighter by a hermit. When Little Bastard grows up, he feels he is old enough to go out and look for his parents. Luckily for him, he befriends a beggar, Hsiao Yi, who being street-wise, manages to help him find his family, but somehow gets into trouble with the gang.

programme.title: Four Riders
programme.desc: Four martial arts experts live in Seoul after the Korean War in the 1950s. One of them inexplicably crosses path with a drug trafficking syndicate, and his three friends have no choice but to fight a brutal battle on his side...

programme.title: Heroes Two
programme.desc: Shaolin disciple Hong escapes from the burning temple after it is attacked by the Qing army and is badly wounded. He is handed over to the Qing soldiers by Fang as he mistakes Hong for a bandit. When Fang realizes his mistakes, he tries all ways to help Hong escape so that they can team up to fight the Qing army together.

programme.title: The Dream of the Red Chamber
programme.desc: Adapted from the most widely read and filmed novel in Chinese history, this version is said to be the most successful one. Betty Loh's looks, demeanour and aura in her portrayal of Lin Dai Yu has won her the epithet "Classic Beauty".

programme.title: The Gambling Syndicate
programme.desc: A young provincial detective seeks to take down a local gambling syndicate with the help of two convicts.

programme.title: The Shepherd Girl
programme.desc: In this musical drama, Hsiu Hsiu, a beautiful shepherd girl, falls in love with a handsome boatman Ta Lung. However, she cannot afford to marry him because of her father's towering debt from gambling. To complicate the matter, a rival suitor promises to pay off all her father's debts on one condition: that Hsiu Hsiu marries him...

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: Hsieh Choun, the Black Dragon, is in trouble with the police since Wang Sien Tien's gang is helping them; he is no longer free to conduct his drugs shipments out of the port freely as he used to. He buys more thugs and killers to dispose of the young upstart, and soon Wang is in dire straits, in the port of Hong Kong.

programme.title: The Blue and the Black Part 2
programme.desc: Continuing from the first movie, Tang Qi ends her career as a nightclub singer and starts searching battle-scarred China for her lover Chang, who is now entangled with Japanese invaders, communist insurgents, and a warlord's beautiful daughter.

programme.title: Heroes of the East
programme.desc: A Chinese man marries a Japanese woman through an arranged marriage and manages to insult all of her Japanese martial arts family by issuing a challenge to her that is misinterpreted by the others. He must then prove how good Chinese Kung Fu really is through a series of duels with the seven Japanese martial artists who come to meet the challenge!

programme.title: Passing Flickers
programme.desc: This film is an amusing insider's look at the Hong Kong film industry and is based on Director Li Han Hsiang's popular newspaper column recounting his work at Shaw Brothers. The collection of some of his funniest and most surreal film musings of the era, filled with behind-the-scene asides, this is a must-see for any Hong Kong cinema aficionado!

programme.title: Flying Guillotine 2
programme.desc: In a time of anti-Manchu sentiment, Emperor Yong Zheng employs his ruthless Blood Hound Corps to silence any dissenters. Only one man and his signature weapon, The Flying Guillotine, stand in their way.

programme.title: Puppy Love
programme.desc: To the tune of the Osmonds hit song, this is a story of adolescent playfulness & innocence lost. Two best friends grow up together and teasingly meet two delightfully impish boys leading to the four to flirtatiously intermingle. However, the innocence of partner swapping eventually leads to a roller-coaster bouts of misunderstood emotions.

programme.title: The Long Chase
programme.desc: Governor Yan is killed and his guard Fan identifies Kou as the assassin by his signature weapon, a dart. Kou is listed as a wanted man when he enters the city, but managed to escape arrest with the help of the innkeeper's daughter. At the same time, Fan is attacked by a bandit who pretends to be Kou. What are the secret plots behind these attacks?

programme.title: When the Clouds Roll By
programme.desc: Su is a schizophrenic who refuses to believe that her pilot lover is killed in a plane crash and makes up stories to deal with things. She runs into an old classmate Lai, who is also a doctor one day, and he finds ways to treat her illness. Su slowly recovers and accepts the reality, as well as her newfound love.

programme.title: Diary of a Lady-killer
programme.desc: Tycoon Zhou is a playboy who is engaged to be married, but that did not keep him from working his charms on as many ladies as he can. He keeps a diary about his romantic escapades and soon, the women with whom he has been intimate with are being murdered one by one. Zhou becomes the number one suspect by the police but is the killer someone else?

programme.title: The Perfumed Arrow
programme.desc: A charming Huangmei Opera title, this is the story of Fei E, a General's daughter who grows up fooling everyone that she is a boy, including her two closest schoolmates. When she has to choose one of them to marry, how will Fei E tell them that she is a girl? To complicate matters, a girl who Fei E saves one day only wants to be married to her!

programme.title: River of Tears
programme.desc: Retired singer Fang lives happily with her husband and son. Tragedy happens when a man from her past returns to haunt her. In an ensuing struggle to free her from his clutches, her husband dies in a car accident. Blamed by her father-in-law for her husband's death, Fang gets chased out of the house and goes back to singing to make a living...

programme.title: To Kill a Jaguar
programme.desc: Set in 1920s Shanghai, a village girl journeys to the big city in search of her father and meets her childhood friend Jaguar, who works for the mob boss Kam. In a world controlled by the mobs, it is a test of survival for all as Jaguar allies himself with ace gunman Ko Tang, to take over Kam's empire.

programme.title: The Crimson Palm
programme.desc: Poor student Lin is engaged to the daughter of a rich man who despises him because of his family's declining status. Lin visits his fiancee before leaving for the Imperial examination, but finds a maid lying dead in blood. As Lin's bloody handprint is left on the site, he is accused of the murder. How can Justice Bao prove his innocence?

programme.title: Shaolin Temple
programme.desc: As more people are learning martial arts from Shaolin, the Qing court orders for it to be banned and plans to destroy the temple. The Shaolin disciples decide to take their protest to the streets, using Shaolin skills to curb their hatred, but when the Qing troops start attacking Shaolin Temple, the disciples vow to protect it at all costs.

programme.title: Emperor Chien Lung and the Beauty
programme.desc: Emperor Chien Lung meets a famous courtesan in Suzhou and in order to spend as much time as possible with her, he builds a direct underground tunnel into the Forbidden City. The emperor's sudden appearances through this direct access shock his people but it is also at this time that he helps the needy and cracks the gambling business in Suzhou.

programme.title: Killer Clans
programme.desc: This intriguing wuxia saga is packed with conspiracies, power schemes and sword fights to produce a perfect blend of great action and gripping drama. The movie centres around the struggle for underworld supremacy between two clans, where the line between good and evil is not always that clear-cut.

programme.title: King Drummer
programme.desc: A young musician Chi Chiang is hired by the manager of a popular band when the group's drummer/leader Charlie, quits to join a rival group. The new drummer becomes an immediate hit, causing Charlie to be very jealous. Furthermore, the young drummer's mother is dead set against him having a music career.

programme.title: The Brave Archer 2
programme.desc: Knowing Guo Jing has won Huang Rong's hand in marriage using the kung fu learned from Jiu Yin manual, Ouyang Feng captures Huang and agrees to release her only if Guo can dictate the content of the manual. Will Guo give in to the threat?

programme.title: Lady General Hua Mu-Lan
programme.desc: Mulan disguises herself as a male soldier to replace her aged father in a war against the barbarians. Her courage brings her victory in battles and she was promoted to a general. When Mulan returns home with glory, the chief commander asks her to marry his daughter, forcing Mulan to reveal her true identity.

programme.title: Heaven and Hell
programme.desc: When an angel, Ling, decides to help his two friends who have fallen in love to escape from Heaven, he is sent to live as a human on earth as his punishment. Reincarnated as a cab driver, he sacrifices his own life to save another ill-fated couple and lands in hell, where he has to face off against the ghosts and demons to fight his way out!

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go
programme.desc: Hosted by Sam Tseng and Hsu Nai Lin, this top Taiwan variety show, splits celebrity guests into two teams to battle in various game segments.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go

programme.desc: A news programme that provides the latest Taiwan and international news, as well as in-depth analyses of important issues around the world.

programme.title: South Wind Knows - EP 35
programme.desc: Adapted from a novel, the story tells the story of how Yun Shen (Cheng Yi), a researcher at a pharmaceutical company and Zhu Jiu (Zhang Yu Xi), a surgeon embarking on a humanitarian medical rescue, got off the wrong foot, but eventually found love.

programme.title: Gone with the Rain - EP 36
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Gone with the Rain - EP 37
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 274
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: James' Going Places - EP 80
programme.desc: Join James, the host with outstanding culinary skills and an appetite for good food, as he explores markets and savours local delicacies in Taiwan!

programme.title: South Wind Knows - EP 36
programme.desc: Adapted from a novel, the story tells the story of how Yun Shen (Cheng Yi), a researcher at a pharmaceutical company and Zhu Jiu (Zhang Yu Xi), a surgeon embarking on a humanitarian medical rescue, got off the wrong foot, but eventually found love.

programme.title: Perfect Match 12 - EP 33
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 421
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: The Legend Of Zu
programme.desc: In the mystical Zu mountains, immortal warriors unite to stop a rogue immortal seeking ultimate power from the Blood Cavern. As darkness threatens their realm, they must wield legendary swords and risk everything to restore balance.

programme.title: Destined - EP 26
programme.desc: Lin Yu Ru, the daughter of a cloth merchant who's suffered childhood hardships and she is married to Gu Jiu Si who is the notorious son of Yangzhou's wealthiest family, infamous for his indolent ways. They grow closer despite their differences.

programme.title: The Line Watchers - EP 7
programme.desc: The drama follows IP Investigation Bureau Senior Superintendent (Benjamin Yuen), Trade Controls Officer (Mandy Wong), Customs Drug Investigation Bureau Superintendent (Venus Wong) get to the bottom of bombs, drugs and more at Hong Kong customs.

programme.title: Perfect Match 12 - EP 33
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.

programme.title: Chinese Restaurant 7 - EP 9
programme.desc: This season showcases guest teams embarking on a new adventure, operating dual businesses in Hungary. With a blend of goodness and delectable tastes, they recreate the aroma of the Silk Road, embarking on a captivating journey of Chinese cuisine across borders.

programme.title: The Line Watchers - EP 8
programme.desc: The drama follows IP Investigation Bureau Senior Superintendent (Benjamin Yuen), Trade Controls Officer (Mandy Wong), Customs Drug Investigation Bureau Superintendent (Venus Wong) get to the bottom of bombs, drugs and more at Hong Kong customs.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 422
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Destined - EP 27
programme.desc: Lin Yu Ru, the daughter of a cloth merchant who's suffered childhood hardships and she is married to Gu Jiu Si who is the notorious son of Yangzhou's wealthiest family, infamous for his indolent ways. They grow closer despite their differences.

programme.title: Hello, Saturday - EP 96
programme.desc: Helmed by the ever-popular veteran show host He Jiong, this all-new variety show features celebrity artistes from China, Hong Kong and Taiwan participating in song and dance performances, games and more.

programme.title: Best Choice Ever - EP 33
programme.desc: Mai Cheng Huan, a post-95 girl from an ordinary Shanghainese family proposes to her boyfriend, Xin Jia Liang, due to her mother's urging. The well-to-do Xin family topples the balance of this relationship. Watch how Cheng Huan embarks on her own growth path.

programme.title: Destined - EP 27
